expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: supporting issues stay context_only_no_defect_analysis and produce summaries
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus: “Supporting issues must remain `context_only_no_defect_analysis` and Phase 1 must produce supporting-issue summaries (context artifacts), not defect analysis.” It also reiterates supporting issues must remain “context evidence only” and “context_only_no_defect_analysis” and lists the expected supporting-issue summary artifacts (context/supporting_issue_*).

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md declares “Primary phase/checkpoint: phase1” and evaluates Phase 1 contract artifacts (e.g., phase1_spawn_manifest.json, context/supporting_issue_*). It concludes “phase1 alignment cannot be validated” due to missing Phase 1 outputs, which is still consistent with operating within the Phase 1 frame rather than producing non-phase1 content.
